title: /DISCORD
body:
After you type /discod a message will be sent in chat to your discord. 
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VUpwXsTL/images/b628f3e757eebf6a2e7082c0a2e9b2a11aa461a1.png)
 
 This plugin allows server owners to give there players easier access to there discord server with just with this simple command.

# Features:

Sends a customizable clickable link to players when they run /discord  

Supports colour (color) formatting 

and more. 

 consider joining the discord @ [DC LINK](https://discord.com/invite/XWNGN8cAwM)
